creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 209914
master (pre-4.0) snapshot

Upstream fixed all Boost issues but not SCons. Patch and build log provided but I haven't tested runtime (don't use this port). If someone can improve upon it or backport Boost fixes to the current version (or v3.0.x snapshot) before the scheduled removal that would be nice.

https://github.com/mapnik/mapnik/files/3962045/mapnik-3.0.12.1078.log
